narrative: An NLP Engineer with six years at Rephrase.ai, a product‑focused startup, brings solid experience building retrieval pipelines. Strong verified skill depth—especially with Milvus, BM25, LlamaIndex and learning‑to‑rank models—was the primary driver of the ranking. Their work on PEFT and LlamaIndex aligns closely with the senior AI/ML role’s focus on search and retrieval, and the product‑company background matches the preference for candidates accustomed to shipping features. However, platform engagement is below average and the candidate is based in Chennai with an unknown notice period, which may affect immediate availability for the Pune/Noida location.
